description.text: Shifting sands have revealed an ancient location in which Heroes can battle over and around the formidable monuments. Two Cubes and a Base.

es.original: Shifting sands have revealed an ancient location in which Heroes can battle over and around the formidable monuments. Two Cubes and a Base.
es.translation:
Arena, tesoros ancestrales y la maldición de una momia.
Dos generadores y un núcleo.

fr.original: Shifting sands have revealed an ancient location in which Heroes can battle over and around the formidable monuments. Two Cubes and a Base.
fr.translation: Les sables mouvants ont révélé un site antique, où les héros peuvent jouer à cache-cache parmi les monuments pharaoniques. Deux cubes et une base.

de.original: Shifting sands have revealed an ancient location in which Heroes can battle over and around the formidable monuments. Two Cubes and a Base.
de.translation: Die Wüste hat einen uralten Ort mit formidablen Monumenten offenbart! Zwei Generatoren und eine Basis.

ru.original: Shifting sands have revealed an ancient location in which Heroes can battle over and around the formidable monuments. Two Cubes and a Base.
ru.translation: Пески расступились и открыли древнее место, на котором герои могут сражаться среди внушительных монументов. Два куба и база.

pt.original: Shifting sands have revealed an ancient location in which Heroes can battle over and around the formidable monuments. Two Cubes and a Base.
pt.translation: O movimento das areias revelou um local antigo, onde os heróis batalham em cima e em volta de monumentos formidáveis. Dois Cubos e uma Base.
